title: Infosys Implements nCino Platform for ABN AMRO Lending Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the next phase of successful implementation and go live of the nCino Platform for ABN AMRO Bank to transform loan origination and collateral management. The project consolidated multiple legacy systems into a unified platform and included migration of over 100,000 records from multiple legacy systems over 11 months. Infosys described the engagement as supporting operational efficiency, customer onboarding, loan origination, collateral management, data quality, API-driven integrations, and regulatory compliance for ABN AMRO.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced the next phase of successful implementation and go live of the nCino Platform for ABN AMRO Bank.

key_facts.fact: The project sought to transform ABN AMRO's loan origination and collateral management process by consolidating multiple legacy systems into a single, unified platform.

key_facts.fact: Infosys is one of the primary Application Development and Maintenance partners of ABN AMRO.

key_facts.fact: Infosys helped facilitate migration of over 100,000 records from multiple legacy systems over a period of 11 months.

processing_notes: No contract value, revenue impact, or deal duration was disclosed. nCino was treated as a third-party platform used in a client implementation, not as an Infosys-owned product or platform.
